Microsoft Teams SDK for Python¶

Welcome to the Microsoft Teams SDK for Python documentation.

This repository contains:

  • Core SDK packages in packages/

  • Example applications in examples/

  • Templates in templates/

For setup and usage details, see the repository README:

  • https://github.com/microsoft/teams.py

Microsoft Teams SDK for Python
